narrative:
Precinct Eastlake City 2C (precinct in Lake County) has 953 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
